titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Sulayman Ibn Dawud Al-Munqari
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Sulayman Ibn Dawud Al-Munqari

segments: ه عن سليمان بن داود المنقريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن القاسم بن محمّد الأصبهانيّ، عن سليمان بن داود المنقريّ المعروف بابن الشّاذكونيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن سليمان بن داود المنقريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن القاسم بن محمّد الأصبهانيّ، عن سليمان بن داود المنقريّ المعروف بابن الشّاذكونيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sulayman ibn Dawud Al-Munqari has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad Al-Isfahani, from Sulayman ibn Dawud Al-Munqari, who is known as Ibn Al-Shadhkuni.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sulayman ibn Dawud Al-Munqari has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad Al-Isfahani, from Sulayman ibn Dawud Al-Munqari, who is known as Ibn Al-Shadhkuni.
